title: Fine Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub Fine (J1MaxErr As Integer, J2MaxErr As Integer, J3MaxErr As Integer, J4MaxErr As Integer [, J5MaxErr As Integer] [, J6MaxErr As Integer])
parameters:
J1MaxErr	Integer number ranging from (0-32767) which represents the allowable positioning error for the 1st joint.

J2MaxErr	Integer number ranging from (0-32767) which represents the allowable positioning error for the 2nd joint.

J3MaxErr	Integer number ranging from (0-32767) which represents the allowable positioning error for the 3rd joint.

J4MaxErr	Integer number ranging from (0-32767) which represents the allowable positioning error for the 4th joint.

J5MaxErr	Optional.  Integer number ranging from (0-32767) which represents the allowable positioning error for the 5th joint.

J6MaxErr	Optional.  Integer number ranging from (0-32767) which represents the allowable positioning error for the 6th joint.
description: Specifies and displays the positioning accuracy for target points.
see_also:
Weight

Fine Example

VB Example:

m_spel.Fine(1000, 1000, 1000, 1000, 0, 0)

C# Example:

m_spel.Fine(1000, 1000, 1000, 1000, 0, 0);
